name: The Woodlands at Homestead Gardens
description: A nature-forward garden-and-woodland event space at the Homestead Gardens estate in Davidsonville, about 20 minutes from Annapolis. Ceremonies take place at The Pergolas, framed by greenery; The Pavilion offers covered shelter to anchor the reception; and The Patio is an open-air zone for music and dancing. Set among cultivated gardens and woods at a working garden center — an outdoor, greenery-rich setting with no chapel or house interior.

price.note: Events from $1,500; full wedding-package pricing is by inquiry (Google Form). Pulled 2026-06-07 — a starting figure only, well under the $7,000 venue limit; the day-of total needs a quote.

availability.notes: No public availability calendar — confirm specific 2026 Saturday availability via the venue's inquiry form. Outdoor garden/woodland venue.

attributes.ceremonySpaces: The Pergolas (ceremony, framed by greenery), The Pavilion (covered reception), The Patio (open-air dancing/music)
attributes.included: Exclusive access to the venue + surrounding gardens, on-site coordinator, ambient indoor/outdoor lighting, private restroom trailer, basic tables and chairs, reserved parking
attributes.setting: Garden-and-woodland event space at a working garden center

flags.label: Catering policy unconfirmed
flags.detail: Whether outside caterers are allowed isn't stated anywhere — 'farm-to-table options' are referenced. Confirm by inquiry before relying on the open-vendor must-have.

scoutNote: A budget-friendly, greenery-rich garden/woodland option close to Annapolis (Davidsonville) — outdoor pergola ceremony + covered pavilion + open patio, exclusive garden access and an on-site coordinator included from $1,500. Good vibe match (nature-forward, no chapel or house interior). VERIFIED: spaces, inclusions, starting price. UNKNOWN (two real gaps to confirm by inquiry): guest capacity is not published, and the catering policy is not stated anywhere — 'farm-to-table options' are referenced but whether outside caterers are allowed (the must-have) is unconfirmed.
